title: Unique Indian Fish Curry
description: A sweet and aerated festive Indian dish from Kerala featuring panang curry paste, sashimi-cut fish, and keto-friendly ingredients, served in a ramekin.

ingredients.name: sashimi-cut fish
ingredients.notes: any white fish like cod or tilapia

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender or food processor, blend the panang curry paste, coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, swerve sweetener, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Arrange the sashimi-cut fish in a single layer in 4 ramekins.
Pour the curry sauce over the fish in each ramekin.
Bake the fish in the preheated oven for 12 minutes or until cooked through.
Remove the ramekins from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve the fish curry hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
